_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Software Quality Assurance Report
summary: The Software Quality Assurance Report ensures process and product conformance to technical requirements for quality, reliability, and functional performance, identifies problems, and initiates corrective actions and quality improvements.
use_relationship: The Software Quality Assurance Report will be used to ensure process and product conformance to technical requirements for quality, reliability, and functional performance, identify problems, and initiate corrective actions and quality improvements. This Data Item Description (DID) contains the format, content and intended use information for the data product resulting from the work task and is applicable to the acquisition of program software requirements.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference Documents.
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and dates of any applicable amendments, notices, and revisions, shall be cited in the contract.

preparation_instructions.title: Content.
preparation_instructions.content: The Software Quality Assurance Report shall contain the following:

children.title: Shall include tables, charts, narrative analysis.
Shall include a description of the quality status, any problem(s), corrective action taken, and recommendations for the following areas:
Database availability, patches applied, and tuning activities.
Metrics on software defect correction and software enhancement, including hours per module, number of modules affected and process adherence.
Configuration Management of the database and software modules.
